items.title: France passes law banning under-15s from social media
items.dek: The law will require social media platforms in France to verify all users age from January.
items.body: The law will require social media platforms in France to verify all users age from January.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Too many hikers are pooping in Colorado's backcountry. Could "wag bags" be the answer?
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Michelin-starred restaurateur faces jail for using ants as dessert garnish
items.dek: Officials say the restaurant in South Korea used some 49,000 ants in various dishes over four years.
items.body: Officials say the restaurant in South Korea used some 49,000 ants in various dishes over four years.
items.author: IriLine Desk
